title: install.sh: per-project default, --global-skills, --no-claude-md
action: Make the layer-1 global skills copy (install_skills_to calls ~:161-171) conditional on new --global-skills flag; default path relies on onboarding per-project sync. Remove default --claude-md pass-through if present; add --no-claude-md pass-through to onboard flags. Update usage/help text and safety notes to describe the per-project layout.

truths: Default run copies nothing into ~/.claude/skills or ~/.codex/skills
--dry-run against a tmp target shows per-project skill plan items

trace.outcome: install.sh: layer-1 global skills copy now gated on --global-skills (default off; per-project sync via onboarding layer 2 is default); --no-claude-md pass-through added, --claude-md kept as no-op alias (no longer sets an install-side flag); usage/help/safety notes rewritten for per-project default layout
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": ["scripts/install.sh (manual dry-run smokes, no automated test suite for this script)"],
  "tests_added_or_changed": [],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Before (HEAD:scripts/install.sh:161-171): install_skills_to was called unconditionally for claude/codex runtimes, always copying into ~/.claude/skills and ~/.codex/skills on every run, dry-run or apply. The --claude-md flag (HEAD:84,96,208-210) defaulted to CLAUDE_MD=0 and only added --claude-md to ONBOARD_FLAGS when explicitly passed, with no --no-claude-md option at all.",
  "verification_run": "bash -n scripts/install.sh -> exit 0 (SYNTAX OK). Smoke 1: `bash scripts/install.sh --dry-run --source . -d <tmp>` -> output shows `skills   global copy skipped (pass --global-skills to also populate ~/.claude/skills, ~/.codex/skills)` and no `would copy`/`would update ~/.claude` or `~/.codex` lines; onboarding plan lists 15 sync_skill items for each of the two per-project targets. Smoke 2: same command plus `--global-skills` -> output shows `would update ~/.claude/skills/bee-hive` and `would update ~/.codex/skills/...` copy lines, and `plan onboard_bee.mjs --repo-hooks --global-skills` confirming pass-through. Smoke 3: `--no-claude-md` -> plan line shows `--no-claude-md` passed through and onboarding plan omits create_claude_md. Smoke 4: `--claude-md` (no other flags) -> plan line shows no CLI flag added and onboarding plan still includes create_claude_md (default-true behavior, confirming --claude-md is a no-op alias).",
  "deliberate_exceptions": ["No automated test harness covers scripts/install.sh; verification is dry-run smoke output only, per the cell's own verify command (bash -n) plus the must_haves' prescribed --dry-run smoke."]
}
